command: cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep "error TS2345" | wc -l
cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep "error TS2345" | grep "app-runtime"
cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep "error TS2345" | grep -v "src/tool/" | grep -v "test/" | grep -v "tests/" | grep -v "app-runtime" | sort -u
cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep "error TS2345" | grep -i "test" | head -10

cd packages/opencode && ls node_modules/effect/dist/dts/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || ls node_modules/effect/src/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "checking package root" && ls node_modules/effect/ 2>/dev/nu
cd packages/opencode && grep -n "interface Effect" node_modules/effect/dist/dts/Effect.d.ts 2>/dev/null | head -5
cd packages/opencode && grep -rn "interface Effect" node_modules/effect/dist/ 2>/dev/null | head -10
cd packages/opencode && grep -n "out A, out E" node_modules/effect/dist/Effect.d.ts | head -3
cd packages/opencode && grep -n "interface Body" node_modules/effect/dist/Effect.d.ts 2>/dev/null | head -5
cd packages/opencode && grep -rn "interface Body" node_modules/effect/ --include="*.d.ts" | head -10
